description: Golden cases for adversarial Enma hallucination regression with expected finding codes.

cases.name: enma-rejects-lifecycle-routine-missing-cast
cases.input: void r(int64 d){} int64 main(){ register_routine(r,0); return 1; }

cases.name: enma-rejects-lifecycle-routine-wrong-signature
cases.input: void r(){} int64 main(){ register_routine(cast<int64>(r),0); return 1; }

cases.name: enma-rejects-render-invented-draw-esp
cases.input: import "vec"; import "color"; void r(int64 d){ draw_esp(vec2(0,0), color(255,0,0,255)); } int64 main(){ register_routine(cast<int64>(r),0); return 1; }

cases.name: enma-rejects-render-draw-text-too-few
cases.input: import "vec"; import "color"; int64 main(){ draw_text("hi"); return 1; }

cases.name: enma-rejects-render-draw-text-raw-coords
cases.input: import "vec"; import "color"; int64 main(){ draw_text("hi", 20, 20); return 1; }

cases.name: positive-render-text
positive-draw-line
cases.input:
import "vec"; import "color";
int64 main(){ draw_line(vec2(0.0,0.0), vec2(10.0,10.0), color(255,255,255,255), 1.0); return 1; }

cases.name: positive-draw-circle
cases.input:
import "vec"; import "color";
int64 main(){ draw_circle(vec2(10.0,10.0), 4.0, color(255,0,0,255), 1.0, true); return 1; }

cases.name: positive-math-import
cases.input:
import "math";
int64 main(){ float64 x = atan2(1.0,2.0); return 1; }

cases.name: positive-array-syntax
cases.input: int64 main(){ int32[] xs; xs.push(1); return 1; }
